testCaseName: Apply for a Job Based on Company
testCaseDescription: Verify that a candidate can search for jobs by company name, select a matching job, apply for it, and see the application with status PENDING in the dashboard

steps.step: Login with candidate credentials: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login
Search for jobs by company name: GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs?company=CloudNine%20Technologies
Extract jobId from the company search response
steps.responseBody: jobId = 3 (extracted from GET /api/jobs where company = CloudNine Technologies)

steps.step: Apply for the job at CloudNine Technologies: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Verify application appears in dashboard with status PENDING: GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/my

testCaseName: Apply for a Job Based on Job Title
testCaseDescription: Verify that a candidate can search for jobs by job title, select a matching job, apply for it, and see the application with status PENDING in the dashboard

steps.step: Login with candidate credentials: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login
Search for jobs by title: GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs?title=Software%20Developer
Extract jobId from the title search response
steps.responseBody: jobId = 1 (extracted from GET /api/jobs where title = Software Developer)

steps.step: Apply for the Software Developer role: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Verify application appears in dashboard with status PENDING: GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/my

testCaseName: Apply for a Job Based on Location
testCaseDescription: Verify that a candidate can search for jobs by location, select a job available in that location, apply for it, and see the application with status PENDING in the dashboard

steps.step: Login with candidate credentials: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login
Search for jobs by location: GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs?location=Bangalore%2C%20India
steps.responseBody:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Jobs retrieved",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "title": "Software Developer",
      "description": "Java backend developer role",
      "location": "Bangalore, India",
      "company": "TechCorp Solutions",
      "salary": "8,00,000 - 15,00,000",
      "type": "FULL_TIME",
      "active": true
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "title": "Full Stack Developer",
      "description": "Full Stack Developer role",
      "location": "Bangalore, India",
      "company": "CloudNine Technologies",
      "salary": "12,00,000 - 20,00,000",
      "type": "FULL_TIME",
      "active": true
    }
  ]
}

steps.step: Extract jobId for first job in Bangalore from the location search response
steps.responseBody: jobId = 1 (extracted from GET /api/jobs where location = Bangalore, India)

steps.step: Apply for the job in Bangalore: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Verify application appears in dashboard with status PENDING: GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/my

testCaseName: Apply for a Job with Highest Salary
testCaseDescription: Verify that a candidate can search for jobs sorted by highest salary, select the top-paying job, apply for it, and see the application with status PENDING in the dashboard

steps.step: Login with candidate credentials: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login
Search for jobs sorted by highest salary: GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs?sortBy=salary&order=desc
steps.responseBody:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Jobs retrieved",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 5,
      "title": "Principal Engineer",
      "description": "Senior Principal Engineer role",
      "location": "Hyderabad, India",
      "company": "InfoSystems Ltd",
      "salary": "25,00,000 - 40,00,000",
      "type": "FULL_TIME",
      "active": true
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "title": "Full Stack Developer",
      "description": "Full Stack Developer role",
      "location": "Bangalore, India",
      "company": "CloudNine Technologies",
      "salary": "12,00,000 - 20,00,000",
      "type": "FULL_TIME",
      "active": true
    },
    {
      "id": 1,
      "title": "Software Developer",
      "description": "Java backend developer role",
      "location": "Bangalore, India",
      "company": "TechCorp Solutions",
      "salary": "8,00,000 - 15,00,000",
      "type": "FULL_TIME",
      "active": true
    }
  ]
}

steps.step: Extract the jobId of the highest-paying job from the sorted response
steps.responseBody: jobId = 5 (data[0] — highest salary: 25,00,000 - 40,00,000, company: InfoSystems Ltd)

steps.step: Apply for the highest-paying job: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Verify application for highest-paying job appears in dashboard: GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/my

testCaseDescription: Verify that applying to the same jobId a second time returns HTTP 400 Bad Request with a duplicate application error message

steps.step: Login with candidate credentials: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login
Apply for the job (first time): POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Apply for the same job again (second time): POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications

testCaseDescription: Verify that GET /api/applications/my returns all submitted applications for the logged-in candidate with job title, company, location, status and appliedAt for each entry

steps.step: Login with candidate credentials: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login
Retrieve all applications for the logged-in candidate: GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/my
Verify each application entry contains job title, company, location, status and appliedAt
steps.responseBody: Each entry has: job.title, job.company, job.location, status in [PENDING, REVIEWED, SHORTLISTED, ACCEPTED, REJECTED], appliedAt in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss)

testCaseName: E2E: Search by All Parameters, Apply and View Dashboard
testCaseDescription: End-to-end flow: login as candidate, search using company + title + location + highest salary, apply for the top result, and verify the application appears in the dashboard with status PENDING

steps.step: Login with candidate credentials: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login

Search using all parameters (company, title, location, sortBy salary desc): GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs?company=CloudNine%20Technologies&title=Full%20Stack%20Developer&location=Bangalore%2C%20India&sortBy=salary&order=desc
Extract jobId of the top result from the combined-parameter search response
steps.responseBody: jobId = 3 (top result: Full Stack Developer at CloudNine Technologies, Bangalore, salary 12,00,000 - 20,00,000)

steps.step: Apply for the top-result job: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Verify the new application appears in the dashboard with status PENDING: GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/my
